requirements.title: Form Authentication
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to authenticate via a login form.

requirements.title: File Upload
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to upload files to the server.

requirements.title: File Download
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to download files from the server.

requirements.title: Home Page Examples List
requirements.description: The system shall display a list of links to all available example pages.

requirements.title: Footer Attribution
requirements.description: The system shall provide a consistent footer section attributing the site to Elemental Selenium on example pages.

requirements.title: Checkbox State Toggle
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to toggle checkbox states.

requirements.title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
requirements.description: The system shall grant access to a secure area when valid credentials are provided.

requirements.title: User Authentication
requirements.description: The system shall authenticate the user when provided with valid credentials.

requirements.title: Error Handling for Invalid Credentials
requirements.description: The system shall display an error message when login information is incorrect.

requirements.title: Dropdown Selection
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to change the selection within a dropdown list.

requirements.title: Basic Alert Trigger
requirements.description: The system shall trigger a JavaScript alert dialog upon user interaction.

requirements.title: Confirm and Prompt Triggers
requirements.description: The system shall trigger JavaScript confirm and prompt dialogs upon user interaction.

requirements.title: Drag and Drop Example Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall render a region that supports drag-and-drop functionality.

requirements.title: Data Tables Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display data tables containing specific user information columns.

requirements.title: Row Actions Representation
requirements.description: The system shall provide edit and delete action controls within each table row.

requirements.title: Notification Message Rendering
requirements.description: The system shall display a notification message above the page heading.

requirements.title: Load New Notification Message
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to refresh or load a new notification message.

requirements.title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
requirements.description: The system shall automatically display an advertisement modal upon initial page load.

requirements.title: Close Ad and Prevent Reappearance
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to close the advertisement and suppress it on subsequent page loads.

requirements.title: Ad Re-enablement
requirements.description: The system shall allow the user to re-enable an ad that has been previously closed.

requirements.title: Random Typo Behavior
requirements.description: The system shall randomly include or exclude typos in the displayed text on page load.

requirements.title: Add Element Action
requirements.description: The system shall add a new element to the page when the add element trigger is activated.

requirements.title: Remove Added Elements
requirements.description: The system shall allow the removal of dynamically added elements from the page.

requirements.title: Hover-to-Reveal Behavior
requirements.description: The system shall reveal hidden user details when the user hovers over an image.

requirements.title: Dynamic Content Refresh
requirements.description: The system shall load new text and images on each page refresh.

requirements.title: Numeric Input Handling
requirements.description: The system shall accept numeric entry in the designated input field.

requirements.title: Horizontal Slider Interaction
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to adjust a horizontal slider and reflect the updated value.

requirements.title: Custom Context Menu
requirements.description: The system shall provide a custom context menu triggered by a right-click action.

requirements.title: Exit Intent Detection
requirements.description: The system shall detect when the user moves the mouse out of the viewport to trigger a modal.

requirements.title: Password Retrieval
requirements.description: The system shall allow users to request a password retrieval via email.

requirements.title: Geolocation Access
requirements.description: The system shall retrieve and display the user's current geographic coordinates.

requirements.title: JavaScript Dialog Handling
requirements.description: The system shall trigger and process browser-native dialogs including alerts, confirms, and prompts.

requirements.title: Infinite Scroll Content Loading
requirements.description: The system shall dynamically load content as the user scrolls down the page.

requirements.title: New Window Management
requirements.description: The system shall handle the opening of new browser windows.

acceptance_criteria.description: User shall be granted access upon providing valid credentials.
User shall be denied access upon providing invalid credentials.
User shall be able to select a file from the local system.
User shall receive confirmation upon successful file upload.
User shall be able to initiate a download for an available file.
User shall receive the requested file in the browser download directory.
The page shall display a heading 'Welcome to the-internet' and a subheading 'Available Examples'.
The page shall present a vertical list of example names rendered as hyperlinks.
The page shall display a footer containing the text 'Powered by Elemental Selenium'.
The footer rendering must not interfere with the primary feature of the page.
The checkbox shall toggle its checked state upon user interaction.
The checkbox shall toggle its unchecked state upon user interaction.
The system shall authenticate the user when 'tomsmith' and 'SuperSecretPassword!' are provided.
The system shall redirect the user to the secure area upon successful authentication.
System shall authenticate user with username 'tomsmith' and password 'SuperSecretPassword!'.
System shall navigate to the secure area upon successful authentication.
System shall display an error message when invalid credentials are provided.
System shall prevent navigation to the secure area when credentials are invalid.
System shall display 'Option 1' and 'Option 2' as selectable choices.
System shall update the visible selection to the chosen option.
System shall accept a file selected by the user.
System shall process the upload action upon user initiation.
A JavaScript alert dialog must appear when the trigger is activated.
The system must allow the result area to update after the alert is dismissed.
A JavaScript confirm dialog must appear when the confirm trigger is activated.
A JavaScript prompt dialog must appear when the prompt trigger is activated.
The page must include a visual region designated for drag-and-drop.
The drag-and-drop region must be accessible upon loading the page.
The table must contain columns for Last Name, First Name, Due, Web Site, and Action.
The table must display the predefined row data provided in the source.
Each row must contain an edit control.
Each row must contain a delete control.
A notification message must be visible above the page heading.
The message must convey an outcome status.
The system must generate a new message upon user request.
The system must remain stable and error-free during message loading.

acceptance_criteria.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
acceptance_criteria.description: The advertisement must appear automatically on the first page load.

acceptance_criteria.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
acceptance_criteria.description: The advertisement must be visually distinct from the background content.
The advertisement must be removed from view upon clicking the close control.
The advertisement must not reappear on subsequent page loads after being closed.
User shall be able to trigger the re-enablement control.
Subsequent visits to the page shall display the ad on page load.
The page shall display text that varies in accuracy across different page loads.
The system shall render text without typos on some page loads.
The system shall generate a new UI element upon each activation of the add action.
The system shall support multiple consecutive additions of elements.
The system shall remove the specific element associated with the removal action.
The removed element shall no longer be visible in the DOM.
User details shall become visible when the mouse pointer is over the image.
User details shall be hidden when the mouse pointer leaves the image area.
Content shall change upon manual page refresh.
The system shall support a static content mode via URL parameter.
The system shall accept numeric characters in the input field.
The system shall support incrementing or decrementing values via browser default controls.
Slider value must update when moved via mouse drag.
Slider value must update when moved via keyboard arrows.
Right-click must trigger the custom context menu.
Selecting the menu item must trigger a JavaScript alert.
Modal must appear when mouse leaves the viewport.
Modal must be dismissible via a close control.
Clicking a file link must initiate a browser download.
The system must display a list of available files.
The system must accept an email address input.
The system must process the retrieval request upon submission.
The system must request permission to access location data.
The system must display latitude and longitude on the page.
System shall grant access only when valid username and password are provided.
System shall process uploaded files without crashing the application.
System shall handle submission attempts where no file is selected.
System shall render result output after user interaction with dialogs.
System shall remain functional after dialog dismissal or cancellation.
Slider shall respond to both mouse drag and keyboard arrow key inputs.
Slider value shall clamp at the defined minimum and maximum limits.
System shall append new content sections upon reaching the scroll threshold.
System shall stop loading new content when no further data is available.
System shall display coordinates when user grants location permission.
System shall handle permission denial without application crash.
System shall open a new window upon user trigger.
Base page shall remain functional if a new window is blocked by browser settings.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Login
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Logout
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session is terminated and redirected to login page.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload Valid File
steps: Select a valid file from local storage
positive_scenarios.expected_result: File is successfully uploaded and confirmation is displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Upload File with Standard Extension
positive_scenarios.expected_result: File is processed and uploaded successfully.

positive_scenarios.title: Download Available File
steps: Click on an available file link

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Home Page Content
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Page displays 'Welcome to the-internet', 'Available Examples', and a list of hyperlinks.

positive_scenarios.title: Navigate to Example Page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the corresponding example page.

positive_scenarios.title: Login with Valid Credentials
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is granted access to the secure area.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Footer Presence
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page

positive_scenarios.title: Dismiss Alert
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Alert closes and result area updates.

positive_scenarios.title: Load Drag and Drop Page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Drag and drop region is rendered.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Edit Action
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Edit control is present in every row.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Delete Action
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Delete control is present in every row.

positive_scenarios.title: Verify Stability
steps: Click load new message link multiple times

positive_scenarios.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad on Load

positive_scenarios.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
positive_scenarios.title: Verify Ad Distinction
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Ad is clearly distinguishable from background.

positive_scenarios.title: Re-enable Ad Successfully
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The ad is displayed on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Add Multiple Elements
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Two new elements are displayed on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Reveal Details on Hover
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User name and profile link are displayed.

positive_scenarios.title: Enter Numeric Value
steps: Enter a valid number in the input field
positive_scenarios.expected_result: The number is accepted by the field.

positive_scenarios.title: Update Slider Value via Mouse
steps: Click and drag slider handle to the right
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Value indicator updates to reflect new position.

positive_scenarios.title: Trigger Custom Context Menu
steps: Right-click in the designated box area

positive_scenarios.title: POSITIVE Scenario 2
positive_scenarios.expected_result: File is processed by the system.

positive_scenarios.title: Confirm Dialog Acceptance
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Result output is rendered on the page.

positive_scenarios.title: Adjust Slider via Mouse
steps: Click and drag the slider handle to a new position
positive_scenarios.expected_result: Slider value updates to reflect the new position.

positive_scenarios.title: Load Additional Content
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page
positive_scenarios.expected_result: New content sections are dynamically appended to the page.

negative_scenarios.title: Login With Invalid Credentials
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Authentication fails and error message is displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Upload Without Selecting File
steps: Click upload button without selecting a file
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System indicates no file was selected.

negative_scenarios.title: Download Non-Existent File
steps: Attempt to access a file path that does not exist
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System returns a 404 error.

negative_scenarios.title: Attempt Selection Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No error is triggered.

negative_scenarios.title: Upload Without File Selection
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Browser default behavior applies.

negative_scenarios.title: Trigger Alert Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No alert is displayed until button is clicked.

negative_scenarios.title: Trigger Dialogs Without Interaction
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No dialogs are displayed until buttons are clicked.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Error on Load
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Page loads without runtime errors.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Validation Errors
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Page displays static data without validation errors.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Unexpected Behavior
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No errors occur when viewing row actions.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Crash on Load
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Page loads without crashing.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Error on Failure
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System does not produce runtime errors if message fails to load.

negative_scenarios.requirement_title: Entry Ad Display on First Load
negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Ad on Subsequent Load
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Ad is not displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify No Error on Close
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No error messages are generated.

negative_scenarios.title: Verify Typo Absence
steps: Refresh page until no typo appears
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Text is displayed without typos.

negative_scenarios.title: Remove Non-existent Element
steps: Attempt to click remove on a non-existent element
negative_scenarios.expected_result: No action is performed.

negative_scenarios.title: Enter Non-numeric Value
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Input is rejected or not accepted by the field.

negative_scenarios.title: Slider Interaction Without Focus
steps: Attempt to move slider without focusing
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Slider does not move.

negative_scenarios.title: Left-Click Context Menu
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Custom context menu does not appear.

negative_scenarios.title: Deny Location Permission
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Coordinates are not displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Submit Without File
steps: Click submit without selecting a file
negative_scenarios.expected_result: System handles the empty submission without crashing.

negative_scenarios.title: Cancel Confirm Dialog
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Result output is rendered without script errors.

negative_scenarios.title: Deny Geolocation Permission
steps: Click the button to get location
Select 'Block' on the browser permission prompt
negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application handles the denial gracefully without crashing.

boundary_scenarios.title: Upload Empty File
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System handles empty file upload gracefully.

boundary_scenarios.title: Toggle Multiple Checkboxes
steps: Click all available checkboxes in sequence
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: All checkboxes reflect the toggled state correctly.

boundary_scenarios.title: Verify Minimum Table Rows
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Table displays at least the rows defined in the snippet.

boundary_scenarios.title: Increment Value at Boundary
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: Value increments correctly according to browser behavior.

boundary_scenarios.title: Slider Maximum Value
steps: Drag slider to the far right limit

boundary_scenarios.title: Login With Empty Fields
steps: Leave username and password fields blank
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System treats input as incorrect and displays error message.

boundary_scenarios.title: Upload Large File
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: System processes or rejects the file without crashing the page.

boundary_scenarios.title: Exceed Slider Limits
steps: Attempt to move the slider beyond the maximum value
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: The slider value remains clamped at the maximum limit.
